input.existing_structure: separate fuselage spine and wing-root spar socket blocks
input.problem: wing alignment repeats during assembly

reasoning.rule: fuselage spine may integrate spar sockets if datum faces stay visible
reasoning.serviceability_check: wing keys can be checked from outside

output.proposal: integrated fuselage spine and spar socket core
verification: fit wing-root key
inspect spar socket face

input.existing_structure: tilting nacelle bonded to wing tip
input.problem: motor and ESC cannot be replaced without damaging wing

reasoning.rule: tilting nacelle cores must remain removable

output.proposal: reject bonded nacelle; use removable nacelle service pod
verification: fail if ESC lid cannot open

input.existing_structure: tilt servo buried inside fuselage
input.problem: servo horn cannot be adjusted after assembly

reasoning.rule: tilt linkage cartridge remains separate
reasoning.serviceability_check: servo horn reachable after wing installation

output.proposal: separate tilt linkage cartridge with access pocket
verification: adjust dummy linkage after nacelle installation

input.existing_structure: battery tray and cable clips are loose parts
input.problem: many small operations and unclear CG position
input.constraint: battery dummy must slide for CG demonstration

reasoning.rule: battery rail and cable guide can integrate if slide path remains open

output.proposal: slide-in battery CG rail with open cable channel
verification: slide battery dummy through all CG marks

input.existing_structure: payload nose bay shares screws with fuselage spine
input.problem: sensor swap disturbs structural assembly

reasoning.rule: payload shell should be replaceable without touching wing/nacelles

output.proposal: replaceable payload nose shell with service label
reduced_steps: remove structural screws during payload swap
verification: remove payload shell without loosening wing

input.existing_structure: V-tail hinge integrated into tail boom
input.problem: tail damage requires replacing main fuselage
input.constraint: fragile handled parts should be replaceable

reasoning.rule: tail hinge/control surface stays separate

output.proposal: replaceable V-tail hinge module
verification: remove V-tail module without opening fuselage

input.existing_structure: landing gear molded into fuselage belly
input.problem: gear breaks during handling and damages main body

reasoning.rule: landing gear remains replaceable

output.proposal: replaceable TPU/PETG landing gear pads
verification: replace gear pad after simulated hard handling

input.existing_structure: hidden motor wires through wing
input.problem: wire fault requires wing teardown

reasoning.rule: hidden wiring is bad for serviceability in v1 mockup

output.proposal: open cable channel with fuselage inspection windows
verification: inspect motor wire path without wing removal

input.existing_structure: nacelle datum face printed on support-scarred side
input.problem: tilt-axis reference becomes unreliable

reasoning.rule: tilt-axis datums require controlled print orientation

output.proposal: print nacelle pods with datum pads upward
verification: measure datum pad flatness

input.existing_structure: battery bay is fixed length
input.problem: CG cannot be demonstrated or tuned

reasoning.rule: battery CG slide path is required for tiltrotor mockup

output.proposal: reject fixed battery pocket; use labeled CG rail
verification: fail if battery dummy has only one locked position

input.existing_structure: wing halves use loose alignment tabs
input.problem: tabs are easy to lose and hard to square

reasoning.rule: alignment keys can integrate into fuselage core
reasoning.serviceability_check: wing remains removable from keyed socket

output.proposal: integrated wing-root alignment keys
verification: install/remove wing root five cycles

input.existing_structure: servo linkage rod hidden under fixed cover
input.problem: tilt travel cannot be checked visually

reasoning.rule: linkage path should remain visible in educational mockup

output.proposal: open linkage cartridge with visible dummy rod
verification: check 0-90 degree nacelle travel

input.existing_structure: avionics shelf closed by permanent fuselage top
input.problem: FC stack cannot be inspected

reasoning.rule: fuselage can integrate shelf but not close service access

output.proposal: open avionics service shelf in fuselage spine
verification: view FC placeholder from top

input.existing_structure: nacelle pod has no removable service lid
input.problem: motor and ESC are trapped

reasoning.rule: service lid adds one interface but preserves maintenance

output.proposal: nacelle pod with motor/ESC service lid
verification: open lid without removing wing

input.existing_structure: one-piece wing+nacelle+fuselage shell
input.problem: few parts but all moving interfaces are captive
input.constraint: moving and powered modules stay replaceable

reasoning.rule: one-piece shell violates serviceability metric

output.proposal: split into fuselage core, nacelle pods, linkage cartridges, service module, tail/gear modules
verification: mark as fail if nacelle cannot detach

input.existing_structure: payload and battery share a hidden cable tunnel
input.problem: payload swap can snag battery wiring
input.constraint: front cable path must be visible

reasoning.rule: battery and payload service paths should not conflict

output.proposal: separate payload shell cable window from battery rail channel
verification: swap payload while battery remains installed

input.existing_structure: tail hinge screws are internal
input.problem: tail surface replacement requires fuselage teardown
input.constraint: tail control surface should be field replaceable

reasoning.rule: fragile tail fasteners should be accessible outside

output.proposal: external V-tail hinge fastener bosses
verification: remove hinge pair externally

input.existing_structure: nacelle tilt axis has no visible reference marks
input.problem: operator cannot tell if axis is aligned
input.constraint: tilt datum should teach mechanism logic

reasoning.rule: engraved datum marks improve service without adding parts

output.proposal: engraved tilt-axis datum arrows on nacelle pads
verification: datum marks visible at hover and cruise positions

input.existing_structure: battery rail clearance is zero
input.problem: PETG print variation jams slide path

reasoning.rule: sliding service interfaces need explicit clearance

output.proposal: 0.35 mm battery slide clearance and deburr note
verification: insert/remove battery dummy ten cycles

input.existing_structure: tilt linkage pins share wing-root screws
input.problem: servicing linkage disturbs wing alignment
input.constraint: linkage and wing alignment should be decoupled

reasoning.rule: moving linkage should not share structural alignment fasteners
reasoning.serviceability_check: linkage cartridge removed without wing removal

output.proposal: independent linkage cartridge fasteners
verification: remove cartridge while wing remains installed

input.existing_structure: fuselage spine printed upright
input.problem: long unsupported walls warp and close cable windows

reasoning.rule: print orientation should protect windows and spar sockets

output.proposal: print fuselage long axis on bed with sockets upward and tree support only where needed
verification: check window opening and wing-key fit

input.existing_structure: landing gear pad and battery rail overlap
input.problem: gear replacement can disturb battery module

reasoning.rule: handled gear modules should not share battery service rail
reasoning.serviceability_check: gear replaced while battery rail remains installed

output.proposal: separate external gear pads away from battery rail screws
verification: replace gear pad without removing battery dummy

input.existing_structure: service labels are separate stickers
input.problem: stickers add manual step and fall off

reasoning.rule: engraved labels improve service clarity without assembly cost

output.proposal: engrave NACELLE SERVICE, CG, and PAYLOAD labels
verification: label legibility after print

input.existing_structure: nacelle rotation stop is hidden inside pod
input.problem: travel limit cannot be checked
input.constraint: 0-90 degree tilt demo should be inspectable

reasoning.rule: movement stops should be visible in educational mockup
reasoning.serviceability_check: travel stop visible with service lid open

output.proposal: visible nacelle travel stop tabs near datum pads
verification: verify hover and cruise stop positions

input.existing_structure: motor wires pass through tilt bearing center with no slack window
input.problem: tilt travel may pinch wires
input.constraint: wiring path must support visible tilt motion

reasoning.rule: moving interfaces need visible slack and inspection
reasoning.serviceability_check: wire path remains visible through tilt sweep

output.proposal: visible slack loop window beside nacelle datum pad
verification: move nacelle 0-90 degrees and inspect wire clearance
